purpose: Local executable index for business scenario page generation standards.

coverage_areas.covers: approval, detail, create/edit form, import result, report, customer detail date query, permission admin, exception state, data-entry table
query, fill, approval, submit, reject, lock, import, export, bulk action
fallback table contract until official Table/DataGrid primitive is registered
BarChart evidence, accessibility, threshold lines, legend, labels, color policy
complex form layout, validation, errors, linked controls, async search, permission states
compact/default/spacious density and screenshot thresholds by page family
letter spacing, page title/subtitle hierarchy, PageHeader anatomy, and Container/Grid-backed layout
fixed app shell with content-only scrolling so topbar and navigation do not scroll with page content
Icon/ButtonIcon provenance, no functional glyph fallback, default navigation icons, sidebar toggles, search icons, tree toggles, and link affordance icons
Chinese terminology, button copy, empty/error/success/approval status copy
loading, empty, error, readonly, disabled, permission denied, dirty form, sticky save bar
global shadow/elevation roles for headers, menus, sticky bars, overlays, and top-layer notifications
reference-fit coverage for each business page family
Cursor project rule, command workflow, and required validators
